CheckTitle: Ensure agent blueprints use federated credentials instead of client secrets
Description: Checks whether agent identity blueprints use passwordCredentials (client secrets) instead of federatedIdentityCredentials or key certificates for authentication.
Risk: Client secrets are less secure than federated identity credentials or certificates. Secrets can be leaked in code, logs, or configuration files. Federated credentials eliminate shared secrets entirely.

Remediation.Recommendation: Replace client secrets with federated identity credentials (workload identity federation) or certificate-based key credentials. Remove existing password credentials after migration.

SourceNotes: Federated identity credentials are the recommended credential type for workload identities.
